queries.query: preCISION tumour targeting FAP fibroblast activation protein
AACR 2026 abstract fibroblast activation protein tumor microenvironment

papers: PMC11323568 — mBio 2024 — Oliver Debski-Antoniak et al.
PMC11742610 — Blood Advances 2024 — Nikoletta Pechlivani et al.
PMC11569188 — Scientific Reports 2024 — Sophie J. Heseltine et al.
PMC11298639 — iScience 2024 — Roberts, Martin, Al-Qallaf et al.
keyFindings.summary: Affimers are small (~12kDa), cysteine-free scaffold proteins with high specificity and affinity for target proteins. Avacta's platform uses this scaffold. Key applications: influenza A inhibition, platelet GPVI modulation, HER2-targeted drug/RNA delivery, α2-antiplasmin inhibition for fibrinolysis enhancement.

keyFindings.topic: FAP-targeted therapeutics (relevant to pre|CISION tumour-targeting mechanism)
papers: PMC12308159 — Oncology Reviews 2025 — Hsing Hwa Lee, Zeyad Al-Ogaili (comprehensive review)
PMC9399058 — European Journal of Nuclear Medicine 2022 — Dirk Zboralski et al. (FAP-2286 preclinical)
PMC11168342 — Cancer Research Communications 2024 — Gallant et al. (FAP ADC depletion mechanism)
PMC11258004 — Frontiers in Immunology 2024 — Kraxner et al. (FAP+ CAFs and tumour microenvironment)
keyFindings.summary: FAP (fibroblast activation protein alpha) is selectively expressed in cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs) in >90% of epithelial tumours. Avacta's pre|CISION platform uses FAP as the activation trigger to release doxorubicin preferentially in the tumour stroma rather than systemically. Higher FAP+ CAF density correlates with increased T-cell infiltration (potential synergy with checkpoint inhibitors). FAP-targeted ADCs and radioligands show promising safety profile in clinical studies. FAP+ CAF depletion disrupts tumour-stromal interactions and produces pro-inflammatory response.

No peer-reviewed publications found specifically on Avacta's faridaksorubicin (FA), AVA6000 (Doxorubicin prodrug), or the Phase 1 data readout. The Phase 1 clinical trial for FA (also known as Doxorubicin prodrug or AVA6000) was discussed at AACR 2025 with data in 2024. AACR 2026 abstracts would be the primary source for any April 2026 data.

note: No specific Avacta AACR 2026 abstracts found in the current paper corpus. AACR 2026 abstracts may not yet be indexed. Check AACR conference website directly for April 2026 presentations.
